title: goeppertia longiflora
intro: Goeppertia longiflora, also known as the 'Long-Flowered Calathea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of the Goeppertia longiflora plant have been used in herbal medicine, valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Goeppertia longiflora include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, often used to treat various health conditions.
